刚穿越就要在魔宗求死？萧珏激活死亡免疫，只能死于他人之手！
可他越嚣张，对手越害怕；越想死，敌人越脑补。
他强吻第一魔女，羞辱长老亲传，霸凌各峰长老，在作死的路上狂奔不止。
当全宗长老认定他背后站着失踪的化神老祖……
萧珏崩溃了：“我只想安静地死一次，你们能不能别瞎想？”
直到他一巴掌拍碎敌宗长老的护体罡气，脚踏正道圣子，怀揽绝色妖女，才无奈发现——这修真界，怎么就没人能成全他呢？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o001df616c69aed4257a731ef3bf3a15d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我在异世喝风","author_id":"","book_id":"7601851073216646168","book_name":"你们别脑补了，我真没后手！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3877人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601851164635709976","read_count":"3877","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"206938"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"93","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,系统,穿越,迪化,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o001df616c69aed4257a731ef3bf3a15d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500455&x-signature=tPGd1YGYu70drAdENKVgKcfFBCs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1556552917721831","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094
